content.tagline: Precision Cutting & Fabrication for the Marine World
content.about:
Advanced Waterjet Solutions is Fort Lauderdale's premier provider of precision waterjet and laser cutting services for the marine industry and beyond. Located at 3309 SW 11th Ave in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, we bring cutting-edge technology and over 20 years of expertise to every custom metal fabrication project we take on. Whether you're a boat builder in Broward County or a yacht owner docked along the Intracoastal, we deliver the kind of accuracy and craftsmanship that serious marine work demands.

Our facility specializes in precision waterjet cutting, laser cutting, and custom metal fabrication — services that require tight tolerances and reliable repeatability. We work with a wide range of materials including stainless steel, aluminum, and other marine-grade metals commonly used in structural components, hardware, and vessel outfitting. Our welding and fabrication capabilities cover everything from structural marine welds to custom brackets, frames, and fittings built to withstand the demands of saltwater environments. With two decades of hands-on experience, our team understands the material science and engineering behind every cut and weld.

We serve boat builders, yacht manufacturers, marine repair shops, and individual vessel owners throughout South Florida — from Fort Lauderdale and Miami to Palm Beach and the surrounding region. Clients come to us when fast turnaround times and unparalleled precision are non-negotiable. We take pride in treating every project, large or small, with the same level of care and technical attention. If your build or repair requires components that fit right the first time, Advanced Waterjet Solutions is the shop South Florida's marine community turns to.
content.seoTitle: Advanced Waterjet Solutions | Welding & Fabrication Fort Lauderdale, FL
content.seoDescription: Custom waterjet cutting, welding & metal fabrication for marine industry in Fort Lauderdale, FL. Serving South Florida. Call for fast turnaround.
seoKeywords: custom metal fabrication Fort Lauderdale FL

serviceDescriptions.Welding & Fabrication: Advanced Waterjet Solutions provides precision welding and custom metal fabrication for marine applications, working with stainless steel, aluminum, and other marine-grade materials to produce structural components, hardware, brackets, and custom fittings. Every weld and fabricated part is built to meet the demanding tolerances required in marine construction and repair. From one-off custom pieces to production runs for boat builders and yacht manufacturers, the shop delivers consistent quality with fast turnaround.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Fort Lauderdale, FL, Advanced Waterjet Solutions serves marine clients throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Custom stainless steel brackets and hardware fabricated to marine specs
Structural aluminum welding for boat frames and hull components
Precision waterjet-cut deck plates and hatches for yacht builds
Custom marine railings, arches, and T-top frames welded to order
Replacement metal components fabricated for marine repair shops
Laser-cut stainless fittings and trim pieces for vessel outfitting
Prototype and production fabrication runs for boat manufacturers
